$schema: Each asset describes a real Zevo app screen/feature. The concept generator and asset picker prefer these over Pexels stock when there is a semantic match for the shot.

assets.description: A user completes the Zevo app's Turkish onboarding questionnaire. They select their workout availability ("3'ten fazla" hours) and desired progress rate ("Agresif"). The app then displays a confirmation screen, "Tebrikler! Programınız Hazır", with confetti, and prompts the user to "Diyet Planı Oluştur" (Create Diet Plan).
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video walks through the multi-step personalization questionnaire, showing how the app gathers user preferences to generate a custom fitness program.

assets.description: A user completes the Zevo app's onboarding questionnaire in Turkish. They select their age as "22", height as "186 cm", and weight as "92 kg". The process finishes on a screen that reads "Tebrikler! Programınız Hazır" (Congratulations! Your program is ready), with confetti animation.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video walks through the step-by-step process of a user inputting their personal data during the app's initial setup.

assets.description: A user's hand holds a phone, quickly tapping through the Zevo app's Turkish onboarding questions. Screens ask 'Nerede antrenman yapıyorsun?', 'Deneyim seviyen nedir?', and 'Fitness hedefiniz nedir?'. The flow ends on a success screen with confetti, reading 'Tebrikler! Programınız Hazır', demonstrating the creation of a personalized plan.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video showcases the step-by-step user onboarding and personalization flow, from answering initial questions to the program creation confirmation.

assets.description: A user's hand holds a phone and quickly taps through the Turkish onboarding questionnaire, selecting options for activity level, health issues, and progress goals. The process concludes with a confirmation screen showing confetti and the text "Tebrikler! Programınız Hazır" before prompting the user to "Diyet Planı Oluştur" (Create Diet Plan).
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video clearly demonstrates the step-by-step user flow of the initial onboarding questionnaire, a core feature for personalizing the fitness plan.

assets.description: A user sets up their phone and begins a workout. The screen recording shows the Zevo app's AI form-check feature tracking squats with a skeletal overlay. The UI displays the exercise as "Squat", a "FORM" score fluctuating between "50" and "45", and a rep count of "1 / 12".
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video clearly demonstrates the AI form-check feature in action, showing the skeletal overlay, real-time form score, and rep counting during an exercise.

assets.description: A screen recording of the Zevo app's AI form check feature. A user performs a seated dumbbell 'Shoulder Press' while a turquoise skeleton overlay tracks their movement. The app displays a '100' form score, counts reps ('TEKRAR') up to '2 / 12', and shows a weight of '50 Yük'.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video showcases the live AI-powered rep counting and form scoring during a shoulder press exercise.

assets.description: A screen recording of the Zevo app's AI form check for a "Squat". A skeletal overlay tracks the user's movement, counting reps ("TEKRAR") up to "4 / 12". A "FORM" score is visible, starting at "45", and on-screen text indicates the bottom ("DİPTE") and top ("ÜSTTE") of the movement.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video clearly demonstrates the app's core AI feature, showing real-time form tracking, rep counting, and scoring during a squat exercise.

assets.description: A point-of-view shot of the Zevo app tracking a seated dumbbell shoulder press. The AI form check feature displays a skeletal overlay. The UI shows a perfect "100" form score, a rep count progressing from "0 / 12" to "4 / 12" under "TEKRAR", and the exercise name "Shoulder Press".
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video clearly demonstrates the app's real-time AI form tracking, form scoring, and rep counting during a shoulder press exercise.

assets.description: A user's hand holds a phone displaying the Zevo app. They navigate from the "6. Gün - Full Body" workout plan, which shows "Warm-up" and "Workout" sections, to the "Squat" exercise screen. This screen shows an animation, set tracking for "Tekrar 12" reps, and a "Seti Tamamla" button.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — It clearly demonstrates the user flow of selecting an exercise from a daily plan and interacting with the set and rep tracking screen.

assets.description: A user navigates their "Gün 5 - Omuz" (Day 5 - Shoulder) workout plan. They scroll past exercises like "Overhead Press" and "Lateral Raise" before tapping the "Sonraki Hareket" (Next Exercise) button. The app then displays the "Yürüyüş / Hafif Koşu" (Walking / Light Jogging) exercise with a timer set to "3:00".
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video shows a user navigating through the different exercises within their daily workout plan.

assets.description: A user's hand navigates the Zevo app, tapping from the "Dinlenme Günü" (Rest Day) screen to the scheduled workout for "Gün 5". This is part of the "Yağ Yakım Programı – Fitness", a "40 dk" shoulder workout with "9 hareket". The user can tap "Antrenmanı Başlat" to begin.
assets.narrative: feature-demo — The video clearly demonstrates how a user can view their scheduled workout for a specific day within their personalized fitness plan.

assets.description: Full ZEVO logo reveal animation with final call-to-action. Neon-emerald 'ZEVO' logo with a tech/circuit-board pattern animates on a dark navy background. Tagline 'Cebindeki Antrenör' appears, followed by 'İNDİRİN Google Play' and 'App Store'dan indirin' buttons. Vertical 9:16 format. Serves as a complete short ad or outro.
